one_line: A royal amara-nayaka: a cavalry and fort commander serving the Vijayanagara empire’s cosmopolitan 14th–16th century military system.

appearance.age_look: Early 30s, athletic and broad-shouldered with a disciplined soldier’s build.
appearance.face: Oval face, medium brown South Indian complexion, straight nose, sharp jawline, neatly trimmed moustache and short beard; eyes intense but calm, default expression focused and dignified as if assessing the battlefield.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair, medium length and combed back from the forehead, tied into a small knot at the back of the head; wrapped with a rich deep-red silk turban folded low around the knot, a narrow gold border along the turban’s edge and a simple metal turban ornament at the front.
appearance.costume: Over the torso a fitted quilted cotton war-jacket (chillere) in muted indigo blue with faint vertical stitched lines and a narrow golden-yellow piping along the edges, worn over a long-sleeved cream-coloured cotton tunic; at the waist a broad crimson cloth girdle tightly wrapped, from which hangs a short pleated panel; on the lower body, straight, ankle-length cotton trousers in earthy brown tucked neatly into sturdy dark leather riding boots; across his chest a dark-brown leather baldric and belt set, with small metal rings and a couple of simple pouches, and over one shoulder a lightweight steel plate pauldron with understated engraving, echoing Deccan-style armour but kept practical; arms adorned with two plain bronze armlets and simple iron bracers strapped over the sleeves; around his neck a modest gold chain with a small, flat pendant, and on his ears small gold studs, hinting at noble status without excessive ornament.
appearance.signature: A slightly curved steel talwar with a disc pommel and Indo-Muslim style hilt, sheathed in a dark leather scabbard with bronze fittings, worn slung from his left hip; in hand he often carries a folded palm-leaf record bundle tied with red thread, symbolising his amara revenue grant and administrative authority.

ref_desc: An athletic early-30s South Indian amara-nayaka with medium brown skin, black hair in a knot under a deep-red gold-trimmed turban, indigo quilted war-jacket, cream tunic, brown trousers, dark leather boots and belts, bearing a curved talwar and palm-leaf records in crimson and earthy tones.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body shonen-anime style South Indian amara-nayaka commander: athletic, early 30s, medium brown complexion, oval face with sharp jaw, straight nose, neatly trimmed moustache and short beard, eyes intense yet calm. His black hair is medium length, combed back and tied into a small knot, wrapped in a deep-red silk turban with a narrow gold border and a simple metal ornament at the front. He wears a fitted indigo blue quilted war-jacket with subtle vertical stitching and golden-yellow piping over a cream long-sleeved cotton tunic, a broad crimson cloth girdle at the waist with a short pleated panel, straight ankle-length earthy-brown trousers tucked into sturdy dark leather riding boots, and a dark-brown leather belt and baldric with small metal rings and pouches. Add a single modest steel pauldron on one shoulder, bronze armlets, plain iron bracers over his sleeves, a thin gold chain with a small pendant, and gold ear studs. At his left hip hangs a dark leather scabbard with bronze fittings holding a slightly curved steel talwar; in one hand he carries a tied bundle of palm-leaf revenue records. Use an indigo, crimson, earthy brown, cream and dark leather colour palette, and present him in a neutral stance, clearly showing his face, hair, turban, full costume and signature talwar and palm-leaf records for consistent redrawing.
